inline_comments.message:
Hi,

This need to be corrected.
if you define clusterIp as service.type=ClusterIp then make all will fail.

Thanks,
Mayank Gupta

Make all was working when i did following changes.
Since then, there have been lots of changes happened on each component and now I believe it would give errors for most of them.
Also, I’m getting merge conflict for few components.
I think I should abandon it and in Casablanca onwards one should update NOTES.txt license whenever work on any components.
